failure_modes.text: Teams can build precise models around the wrong target when convenient proxies stand in for the real causal question.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when convenient proxy metrics are treated as the underlying reality, producing precise analysis around the wrong target.
failure_modes.mitigation: Validate that the measured proxy is causally connected to the real question; precise models around the wrong target produce confident wrong answers.

failure_modes.text: Analysis can degrade into dashboard theater if framing, measurement, modeling, and communication are never separated.
failure_modes.source_quote: Works best when teams must separate question framing, measurement design, modeling, and communication so analysis does not collapse into dashboard theater.
failure_modes.mitigation: Separate framing, measurement, modeling, and communication as distinct steps; collapsing them produces dashboard theater instead of insight.

failure_modes.text: Metric optimization can suppress stakeholder-context signals that explain why the measured pattern is shifting.
failure_modes.source_quote: data-science-reasoning-framework conflicts with empathy (empathy) when metric optimization suppresses stakeholder-context signals that explain behavior shifts.
failure_modes.mitigation: Integrate stakeholder context into the analysis loop; metric optimization that ignores why the pattern is shifting will miss the explanation.

premortem_questions.text: What causal question are we actually trying to answer before we decide what to measure?
premortem_questions.source_quote: modeling before agreeing on the causal question or business decision

premortem_questions.text: Which proxy are we treating as reality, and what behavior might it be hiding?
premortem_questions.source_quote: convenient proxy metrics are treated as the underlying reality

premortem_questions.text: What competing explanation would still fit the observed data if our preferred story were wrong?
premortem_questions.source_quote: competing explanations need to be compared against observed data

heuristics.text: Separate framing, measurement, modeling, and communication before you call the work analysis.
heuristics.source_quote: separate question framing, measurement design, modeling, and communication

heuristics.text: Write the causal question first so modeling effort stays tied to a decision-relevant target.
Force competing explanations to survive contact with the same observed data.
heuristics.source_quote: competing explanations need to be compared against observed data

curation_notes.summary: Focused on turning noisy evidence into explicit hypothesis-and-test structure rather than on generic analytics fluency.
donor_drops: Dropped broader donor-style elaboration in favor of three compact source-grounded intervention chunks per type.
open_questions: Relation richness stays in Wave 3; Wave 2 only preserves the intervention surface needed for preview substrate use.

allies: Wave 3 preserves the first-order ally surface where the raw source gives a clean current-vocabulary seam.
antagonists: Wave 3 preserves the strongest current-vocabulary conflicts and leaves weaker cross-model seams omitted on purpose.
structured_tensions: Wave 4 remains observational only; this batch does not widen higher-order source coverage.
